description.value: You draw no distinction between the sleeping and waking worlds. Your @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Daydream Trance] has an unlimited duration, and you no longer need to take an action to enter it. If you're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Unconscious] due to sleep, you don't take the –4 penalty to AC, Perception, and Reflex saves, and don't have the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Off-Guard] condition. You're still @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Blinded] while asleep. You can act on your turn while asleep, though you're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Slowed]{Slowed 2} until you fully awaken.
